videos.headline: Justin Stevenson avoids defender for Wyoming TD grab
videos.description: Kaden Anderson slings out a pass to Justin Stevenson, who makes a defender miss and trots into the end zone for Wyoming.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Justin Stevenson avoids defender for Wyoming TD grab) 2024/11/24 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jambres Dubar powers Boise State ahead late with rushing TD
videos.description: Jambres Dubar trucks his way into the end zone to propel Boise State in front of Wyoming late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jambres Dubar powers Boise State ahead late with rushing TD) 2024/11/24 ESHEET
